scope: Biotech/pharma deals announced 2021-01-01 through 2026-05-25, global. Three deal types: Acquisition (full equity, all sizes — US public-company acquisitions sourced systematically from SEC EDGAR SC 14D9 + DEFM14A filings filtered to biotech SIC codes 2830/2833/2835/2836/8731), Licensing (asset/platform rights, $500M+ headline), Partnership+Equity (collab with equity component, $500M+ headline). All dates are ANNOUNCEMENT dates. For public-target acquisitions, deal_structure includes $/share offered + reference unaffected closing price where known. Excludes CRO/diagnostics-only acquisitions, SPAC business combinations, and Concentra-style wind-down purchases.
notes: Headline value = max economic value to seller including milestones (licensing) or equity value at announcement (acquisitions). Where share prices show 'verify' or '~', double-check before citing. Fact-check workflow: company press release > reputable pharma trade press (Fierce Pharma, Endpoints, BioPharma Dive, etc.). Acquisitions backfilled from EDGAR systematic pull May 2026.

deals.deal_structure: $229/share cash. ~$43B equity value. ~33% premium to ~$172 pre-announcement close. Closed Dec 2023 after FTC review.
deals.moa: Nectin-4 ADC (Padcev), CD30 ADC (Adcetris), HER2 TKI (Tukysa), tissue-factor ADC (Tivdak)
deals.pathophysiology: Nectin-4 highly expressed on urothelial carcinoma; ADC delivers MMAE payload selectively; chemo-naïve 1L bladder dominant after EV-302 win
deals.rationale: Replace Ibrance / Xtandi cliff with ADC platform

deals.deal_structure: $330/share cash. ~$14B equity value. ~53% premium to ~$216 pre-announcement close. Closed Mar 2024.
deals.indication: Schizophrenia (approved 2024); Alzheimer's psychosis (ADEPT-2 readout pending — verify); bipolar mania
deals.pathophysiology: First non-D2 antipsychotic — muscarinic activation modulates dopamine indirectly via thalamocortical pathways; spares motor/metabolic side effects
deals.rationale: Cobenfy is centerpiece of BMS neuroscience strategy through Opdivo cliff

deals.deal_structure: $132/share cash. ~$14.6B equity value. ~39% premium to ~$95 pre-announcement close. Closed Apr 2025.
deals.moa: Serotonin 5-HT2A antagonist + presynaptic D2 partial agonist + SERT inhibitor
deals.pathophysiology: Multi-receptor profile gives broad mood-spectrum efficacy w/ favorable metabolic profile vs olanzapine class
deals.rationale: JNJ neuroscience rebuild post-Spravato; positions vs BMS Cobenfy

deals.deal_structure: $31.26/share cash. ~$10.1B equity value. ~95% premium to ~$16 pre-announcement close. Closed Feb 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: Folate receptor alpha overexpressed in epithelial ovarian; DM4 (maytansinoid) tubulin inhibitor
deals.rationale: Establishes AbbVie in ADCs; Elahere $1B+ run-rate

deals.deal_structure: $45/share cash. ~$8.7B equity value. ~22% premium to ~$37 pre-announcement close. Closed Aug 2024.
deals.moa: M4 PAM (emraclidine), D1/D5 partial agonist (tavapadon), α2/3/5 GABA-A PAM (darigabat)
deals.indication: Schizophrenia (emraclidine ph2 failed Nov 2024 — verify); Parkinson's (tavapadon); epilepsy
deals.pathophysiology: Selective muscarinic / dopaminergic modulation to avoid traditional antipsychotic side effects
deals.rationale: AbbVie neuroscience expansion; emraclidine ph2 result was a major value reset post-close

deals.deal_structure: $7.1B upfront cash + $150M near-term milestone. Asset effectively single-program (RVT-3101 anti-TL1A). Pfizer received minority share via prior Roivant arrangement.
deals.pathophysiology: TL1A drives fibrosis + Th1/Th17 inflammation in IBD; biomarker-selected responders enriched
deals.rationale: Roche IBD entry; competing anti-TL1A class (Merck/Prometheus, Sanofi)

deals.deal_structure: $180/share cash. ~$11.5B equity value. ~38% premium to ~$130 pre-announcement close. Closed Nov 2021.
deals.moa: Activin receptor type IIA fusion (activin/GDF trap)
deals.pathophysiology: Restores BMPR2 / activin signaling balance — reverses vascular remodeling in PAH
deals.rationale: Diversify beyond Keytruda; Winrevair tracking to multi-billion peak

deals.deal_structure: $200/share cash. ~$10.8B equity value. ~75% premium to ~$114 pre-announcement close. Closed Jun 2023.
deals.indication: Ulcerative colitis (ph3), Crohn's, systemic sclerosis-related ILD
deals.pathophysiology: TL1A drives both inflammation and fibrosis in IBD via DR3 receptor on T-cells and stromal cells
deals.rationale: Merck I&I anchor; competing with Roche/Telavant and Sanofi

deals.deal_structure: $65/share cash. ~$4.9B equity value. ~38% premium to ~$47 pre-announcement close. Closed May 2024.
deals.indication: IgA nephropathy, lupus nephritis, ANCA vasculitis
deals.pathophysiology: APRIL + BAFF drive pathogenic B-cell maturation and Gd-IgA1 production; dual blockade > anti-APRIL alone
deals.rationale: Vertex diversification beyond CF; competes with Otsuka/sibeprenlimab and Novartis/zigakibart

deals.deal_structure: $2.00/ADS cash + non-tradeable CVR up to $0.30/ADS. ~$1.0B upfront + ~$200M contingent. ~62% premium. Closed Feb 2024.
deals.moa: BCMA x CD19 dual-targeting autologous CAR-T (FasTCAR rapid mfg)
deals.pathophysiology: Dual antigen targeting reduces antigen-escape relapse; FasTCAR 22-36h mfg vs 2-4 weeks standard
deals.rationale: AZ cell therapy entry; SLE/autoimmune CAR-T positioning

deals.deal_structure: $21/share cash + CVR up to $3 contingent. ~$2.0B upfront + ~$400M contingent. ~97% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Jun 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: α-emitter delivers high-LET radiation over very short range — superior tumor cell kill vs β-emitter Lu-177
deals.rationale: AZ RLT entry to compete with Novartis Pluvicto + RayzeBio (BMS)

deals.deal_structure: $57/share cash. ~$3.2B equity value. ~79% premium to ~$32 pre-announcement close. Closed Aug 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: α4β7 mediates gut-tropic T-cell trafficking — same target as Entyvio (vedolizumab) but oral
deals.rationale: Lilly oral I&I expansion; potential Entyvio-class oral alternative

deals.deal_structure: $12.50/share cash. ~$1.4B equity value. ~87% premium. Closed Dec 2023.
deals.moa: Lu-177 PSMA radioligand; somatostatin receptor RLT
deals.pathophysiology: Same MOA class as Pluvicto
deals.rationale: Lilly RLT entry; PNT2002 ph3 SPLASH missed primary 2024

deals.deal_structure: Up to $2.5B in upfront + contingent milestones. Asset deal — Scorpion retains other programs in a separate NewCo. Verify upfront/milestone split.
deals.pathophysiology: Selective targeting of mutant PI3Kα avoids wild-type-driven hyperglycemia of alpelisib
deals.rationale: Lilly oncology PI3K next-gen; competes with Roche inavolisib

deals.deal_structure: $40/share cash + CVR up to $4 contingent on atrasentan/zigakibart milestones. ~$3.2B upfront + ~$300M contingent. ~67% premium. Closed Aug 2023.
deals.moa: Endothelin A receptor antagonist; anti-APRIL mAb
deals.pathophysiology: ETA drives mesangial proliferation + glomerular damage in IgAN; APRIL drives Gd-IgA1 production
deals.rationale: Novartis IgAN combination strategy; growing $1-3B IgAN market

deals.deal_structure: $1.0B upfront cash + up to $750M in contingent milestones. Asset deal — preclinical/early-clinical actinium-225 RLT programs.
deals.pathophysiology: α-particle RLT for solid tumors
deals.rationale: Novartis RLT pipeline deepening beyond Pluvicto

deals.deal_structure: €68/share cash. ~€2.7B equity value (~$2.9B). ~94% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed May 2024.
deals.indication: Myelofibrosis (combo w/ ruxolitinib — MANIFEST-2 missed sx response 2024)
deals.pathophysiology: BET inhibition downregulates MYC, NFκB in MF clone
deals.rationale: Hematology / MPN positioning; pelabresib readout disappointed post-close

deals.deal_structure: $14.75/share cash. ~$2.0B equity value. ~103% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Jun 2023.
deals.pathophysiology: P2X3 on vagal C-fibers mediates cough reflex; selective vs P2X2/3 minimizes taste loss vs gefapixant
deals.rationale: GSK respiratory franchise extension

deals.deal_structure: $1.0B upfront + up to $400M in success milestones. Asset deal effectively — Aiolos was single-program (AIO-001).
deals.pathophysiology: TSLP upstream alarmin drives Th2 + non-Th2 inflammation; long half-life enables semi-annual dosing
deals.rationale: Compete vs AZ/Amgen Tezspire (monthly); leverage AZ's class validation

deals.deal_structure: $60/share cash. ~$2.6B equity value. ~54% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Dec 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: 5-HT2C activation reduces neuronal excitability in epilepsy; selectivity avoids 2B cardiac valvulopathy risk
deals.rationale: Lundbeck rare neuro entry

deals.deal_structure: $28/share cash. ~$2.0B equity value. ~105% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Mar 2024.
deals.moa: PSMA ADC w/ site-specific conjugation (non-natural amino acid)
deals.pathophysiology: PSMA on prostate adenocarcinoma; site-specific conjugation = uniform DAR for improved TI
deals.rationale: JNJ ADC platform + prostate franchise extension (Erleada / Akeega)

deals.deal_structure: $850M upfront cash + undisclosed milestones. Asset-style deal for two preclinical bispecific programs.
deals.moa: IL-13 x TSLP bispecific; IL-13 x IL-22 bispecific
deals.pathophysiology: Combining alarmin (TSLP) + effector cytokine (IL-13) blockade for deeper Th2 suppression
deals.rationale: JNJ I&I bispecific strategy

deals.deal_structure: $32.50/share cash. ~$4.3B equity value. ~27% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Mar 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: PPARδ activation reduces bile acid synthesis + cholestatic inflammation + pruritus
deals.rationale: Gilead liver franchise rebuild post-NASH (selonsertib failure)

deals.deal_structure: $58/share cash + CVR up to $12 contingent on MRTX1719 milestone. ~$4.8B upfront + ~$1B contingent. ~52% premium. Closed Jan 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: KRAS G12C oncogenic in ~13% NSCLC; covalent cys-binding locks GDP-state
deals.rationale: BMS oncology cliff defense; competes w/ Amgen Lumakras

deals.deal_structure: $62.50/share cash. ~$4.1B equity value. ~104% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Feb 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: α-RLT against neuroendocrine tumors; SSTR2 overexpressed
deals.rationale: BMS oncology platform diversification

deals.deal_structure: $116.50/share cash. ~$28.3B equity value. ~48% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Oct 2023 after FTC settlement.
deals.indication: Thyroid eye disease; refractory gout; NMOSD, IgG4-RD
deals.pathophysiology: TED — IGF-1R drives orbital fibroblast hyaluronan production; gout — urate degradation; NMOSD — B-cell depletion
deals.rationale: Amgen rare I&I franchise build

deals.deal_structure: $60/share cash + 2.1243 AZN ADR/share stock. ~$39B equity value (mix of cash & stock). ~45% premium to pre-announcement close. Announced late Dec 2020; closed Jul 2021. Included for relevance to 2021+ cliff narrative.
deals.pathophysiology: Terminal complement (C5) blockade prevents MAC-mediated hemolysis / vascular damage
deals.rationale: AZ rare disease + complement franchise; multi-billion durable revenue

deals.deal_structure: $30/share cash + 1 share of NewCo SpinCo (non-INBRX-101 assets) + CVR. ~$1.7B cash + ~$500M CVR upside. ~52% premium. Closed May 2024.
deals.pathophysiology: AAT inhibits neutrophil elastase; recombinant Fc-fusion extends half-life for monthly dosing vs weekly plasma-derived
deals.rationale: Sanofi rare disease franchise

deals.deal_structure: $1.8B upfront cash. Asset-style — three preclinical/early clinical ADC programs.
deals.pathophysiology: Same target as Elahere but TOPO1 payload vs maytansinoid — potentially broader expression range
deals.rationale: Genmab oncology platform expansion

deals.deal_structure: $1.4B upfront cash. Asset-style, single preclinical program (ALIA-1758 plus BBB-shuttle platform).
deals.moa: Anti-pyroglutamate-amyloid-beta mAb w/ BBB transferrin-receptor shuttle
deals.pathophysiology: Same epitope as donanemab; shuttle enables 50x higher brain penetration → less ARIA risk hypothesis
deals.rationale: AbbVie neuroscience expansion; differentiate vs Leqembi / Kisunla

deals.deal_structure: $47/share cash. ~$3.4B equity value. ~26% premium to ~$37 pre-announcement close. Closed Aug 2025.
deals.pathophysiology: Notch / Wnt / β-catenin in desmoid; MAPK in NF1 plexiform neurofibroma
deals.rationale: Merck rare oncology + Keytruda cliff diversification

deals.deal_structure: $129/share cash + non-tradeable CVR up to $6/share (BLU-808 milestones). ~$9.1B equity value at $129. Premium calculated vs ~$101 pre-announcement close (~28%). Closed Jul 2025.
deals.moa: KIT D816V inhibitor; selective LP-PLA2; wild-type KIT inhibitor
deals.pathophysiology: KIT D816V activating mutation drives mast cell proliferation in SM; wild-type KIT in CSU mast cell activation
deals.rationale: Sanofi rare immunology + mast cell platform

deals.deal_structure: $10.50/share cash + CVR up to $3/share (contingent on PCSK9 program milestones). ~$1.0B upfront + ~$300M CVR upside. ~67% premium to ~$6.30 pre-announcement close. Closed Jul 2025.
deals.moa: In-vivo CRISPR base editing (adenine base editor)
deals.pathophysiology: Single in-vivo edit permanently reduces PCSK9 → durable LDL-C lowering
deals.rationale: Lilly CV gene editing — extension of LDL-C franchise

deals.deal_structure: Co-development & co-commercialization. $1.5B upfront cash + $2B in anniversary payments over 2 yrs + up to $7.6B in success milestones. BMS made undisclosed equity investment in BioNTech. BioNTech sub-licensed BNT327 from China's Biotheus 2023 (~$55M upfront).
deals.indication: NSCLC, TNBC, SCLC, other solid tumors
deals.pathophysiology: Combined checkpoint + anti-angiogenic in single molecule; following ivonescimab class validation
deals.rationale: BMS catches up to PD-1xVEGF class via BioNTech's pre-existing China asset

deals.deal_structure: $500M upfront + up to $4.5B in regulatory & sales milestones + low-double-digit royalties on net sales. Summit gets US/Canada/EU/Japan rights; Akeso retains China + ex-licensed regions.
deals.indication: NSCLC (1L EGFR-mut + 1L NSCLC PD-L1+), HCC, GEP
deals.pathophysiology: Bispecific blocks PD-1 checkpoint and VEGF tumor angiogenesis simultaneously; HARMONi-2 beat pembro head-to-head in China 2024
deals.rationale: Defined the China-out licensing thesis; Summit market cap +1000% on data

deals.deal_structure: $175M upfront + up to ~$9.3B aggregate in option-exercise + milestones across 7 ADC programs + tiered royalties. Multi-asset structure — values vary widely across programs.
deals.pathophysiology: TROP2 overexpressed in epithelial cancers; competes with Datroway
deals.rationale: Largest single-target ADC platform deal of cycle; multiple programs

deals.deal_structure: $588M upfront + up to $2.7B in development & sales milestones + royalties. Single-asset deal.
deals.pathophysiology: Same class as ivonescimab
deals.rationale: Merck catches PD-1xVEGF class — defensive vs Keytruda erosion

deals.deal_structure: $1.25B upfront + up to $4.8B in development & sales milestones + tiered royalties. Pfizer separately made a $100M equity investment in 3SBio (HKEX). Pfizer takes ex-China rights.
deals.pathophysiology: Same class as ivonescimab
deals.rationale: Pfizer joins PD-1xVEGF arms race; equity component to 3SBio

deals.deal_structure: $185M upfront + up to $1.5B in milestones + tiered royalties. Hansoh retains China rights.
deals.pathophysiology: B7-H3 overexpressed across solid tumors; ADC payload kills selectively
deals.rationale: GSK oncology entry into B7-H3 space; competes w/ Daiichi ifinatamab DXd

deals.deal_structure: $800M upfront + $500M near-term contingent + up to $7.1B in milestones + tiered royalties. SystImmune retains China rights; BMS takes ex-China.
deals.pathophysiology: Dual EGFR/HER3 targeting reduces antigen escape; bispecific ADC novel class
deals.rationale: First bispecific ADC license at scale

deals.deal_structure: $100M upfront + up to ~$1.9B in milestones across multiple programs (Lp(a), GLP-1, ADC). CSPC retains China.
deals.pathophysiology: Lp(a) is causal CV risk factor with no approved therapies
deals.rationale: AZ CV pipeline expansion; multiple programs

deals.deal_structure: Undisclosed upfront + up to ~$1.05B in milestones + royalties. Per public filings the entire headline is milestone-loaded with no disclosed upfront — pattern is common for China-origin deals where upfront is small but obscured.
deals.moa: GPRC5D x BCMA x CD3 trispecific
deals.pathophysiology: Trispecific T-cell engager — dual MM antigens reduce escape vs single-target
deals.rationale: AbbVie MM bispecific class entry

deals.deal_structure: $55/share cash. ~$1.9B equity value. ~39% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Jul 2022.
deals.pathophysiology: ACVR1 inhibition reduces hepcidin → addresses MF-related anemia distinct from ruxolitinib
deals.rationale: GSK hematology entry

deals.deal_structure: $68.50/share cash. ~$5.4B equity value. ~7% premium (deal leaked, run-up). Closed Oct 2022. Oxbryta withdrawn Sep 2024 — major writedown.
deals.indication: Sickle cell disease — WITHDRAWN 2024 due to safety signal
deals.pathophysiology: Stabilizes oxygenated HbS, reduces sickling
deals.rationale: Pfizer rare hematology — Oxbryta withdrawn 2024, cautionary tale on M&A IP risk

deals.deal_structure: $76/share cash. ~$4.1B equity value. ~122% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Aug 2022.
deals.pathophysiology: Designed to overcome solvent-front mutations (G2032R) that drive resistance to crizotinib/entrectinib
deals.rationale: BMS oncology precision platform

deals.deal_structure: $18.50/share cash. ~$2.3B equity value. ~204% premium to pre-announcement close. Closed Nov 2021.
deals.pathophysiology: Block CD47 'don't eat me' signal → macrophage phagocytosis of tumor
deals.rationale: Pfizer hematology bet; CD47 class largely disappointed industry-wide

deals.deal_structure: $148.50/share cash + share of new Biohaven 2.0 spinco (non-CGRP assets). ~$11.6B for CGRP franchise. ~33% premium. Closed Oct 2022.
deals.pathophysiology: CGRP key mediator of trigeminovascular pain in migraine
deals.rationale: Pfizer migraine franchise + retains Biohaven 2.0 for non-CGRP assets

deals.deal_structure: $9/share cash + CVR up to $4 contingent on cell-therapy milestones. ~$1.0B upfront + ~$500M contingent. ~215% premium (Poseida was deeply distressed). Closed Jan 2025.
deals.pathophysiology: Off-the-shelf CAR-T scalable manufacturing vs autologous
deals.rationale: Roche cell therapy entry

deals.deal_structure: $600M upfront + up to $1.3B in milestones + royalties. Dren retains other pipeline programs.
deals.pathophysiology: Depletes pathogenic B-cells via macrophage engagement — alternative mechanism to CAR-T B-cell depletion
deals.rationale: Sanofi immunology beyond Dupixent

deals.deal_structure: $221.50/share cash. ~$9.2B equity value. ~109% premium to ~$106 pre-announcement close (CDTX). Closed Jan 7, 2026.
deals.moa: Long-acting neuraminidase inhibitor conjugated to proprietary Fc fragment (antibody conjugate); strain-agnostic
deals.indication: Influenza prevention (Phase 3 ANCHOR study; Breakthrough Therapy designation)
deals.pathophysiology: Single-dose, long-acting protection against seasonal influenza A and B in high-risk adults and adolescents; Fc conjugation extends half-life to enable once-per-season dosing
deals.rationale: Merck diversifies respiratory portfolio with Phase 3 antiviral; CD388 Breakthrough Therapy designation de-risks path to approval

deals.deal_structure: $4.0B upfront cash + up to $2.0B in sales milestones. Asset-style — single program (NDI-034858, now zasocitinib). Closed Mar 2023.
deals.pathophysiology: TYK2 selective inhibition spares JAK1/2/3 — better safety profile vs JAK inhibitor class
deals.rationale: Takeda I&I franchise rebuild

deals.deal_structure: $48.00/share cash. ~$1.4B equity value. 59% premium to $30.19 close on Sept 8, 2025 (127% premium to 60-day VWAP). Tender offer completed Oct 28, 2025.
deals.moa: Long-acting fully human anti-IL-6 monoclonal antibody (Q6M subcutaneous dosing)
deals.indication: Atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD); also developed for thyroid eye disease
deals.pathophysiology: Residual inflammatory risk in ASCVD driven by IL-6/CRP axis; pacibekitug suppresses hsCRP — validates CANTOS/ZEUS thesis with a more convenient dosing profile than Novartis's own ziltivekimab
deals.rationale: Extends Novartis's cardiovascular franchise (Leqvio/inclisiran, pelacarsen) into anti-inflammatory CV risk reduction; provides a longer-acting IL-6 competitor to Novo's ziltivekimab

deals.deal_structure: $8.00/share cash at close plus $2.00/share CVR on first commercial sale of VG-3927. ~$470M upfront / ~$600M including CVR. 246% premium to $2.31 close on May 21, 2025. Closed Aug 6, 2025.
deals.moa: Small-molecule agonist of TREM2 on microglia
deals.pathophysiology: TREM2 loss-of-function variants increase AD risk; agonizing microglial TREM2 may enhance amyloid/tau clearance and shift microglia toward a protective state — a target downstream of the amyloid hypothesis
deals.rationale: Re-enters Sanofi into neurology/AD after prior pipeline pruning; positions vs. Alector/AbbVie's AL002 (TREM2 antibody) and Denali's TREM2 program with an oral option

deals.deal_structure: $23.00/share cash. ~$680M equity value. 118% premium to $10.55 close on Jan 5, 2024. Closed Q1 2024.
deals.moa: Trispecific T-cell engager — DLL3 x CD3 x albumin (half-life extension)
deals.indication: Small-cell lung cancer and DLL3-expressing neuroendocrine tumors
deals.pathophysiology: DLL3 is overexpressed on SCLC and neuroendocrine tumors with minimal normal-tissue expression; TriTAC platform extends half-life via albumin binding vs first-gen BiTEs, enabling weekly/Q2W dosing
deals.rationale: Merck oncology portfolio diversification beyond Keytruda; direct competitor to Amgen's tarlatamab (Imdelltra) in SCLC

deals.deal_structure: $15.00/share cash at close (~$838M upfront equity value) plus up to $5.00/share CVR on regulatory and sales milestones — total up to $1.1B. 43% premium to unaffected close. Closed Feb 2024.
deals.moa: Computationally designed self-assembling protein nanoparticle (VLP) vaccine displaying prefusion-stabilized RSV F and hMPV F antigens
deals.indication: RSV and human metapneumovirus prevention in older adults
deals.pathophysiology: Both RSV and hMPV cause severe lower-respiratory-tract disease in older adults; VLP display drives higher and more durable neutralizing antibody titers than soluble antigens
deals.rationale: Adds a differentiated combination respiratory vaccine asset to AstraZeneca's vaccines and immune therapies pipeline (alongside nirsevimab); first hMPV-containing combo would expand the respiratory franchise vs GSK/Pfizer/Moderna RSV monovalents

deals.deal_structure: $17.00/share cash. ~$1.0B net of cash and debt (~$1.15B gross equity value). 80% premium to 90-day VWAP. Closed June 2023.
deals.moa: Next-generation long-acting synthetic GLP-2 analog (once-weekly subcutaneous)
deals.indication: Short bowel syndrome with intestinal failure (SBS-IF) — Phase 3 STARS
deals.pathophysiology: GLP-2 stimulates intestinal epithelial growth and absorption; in SBS-IF, residual bowel cannot sustain nutrition, requiring parenteral support — long-acting GLP-2 may reduce PN burden
deals.rationale: Diversifies Ironwood's GI franchise beyond Linzess (linaclotide, IBS-C) with a rare-disease asset; positions against Takeda's Gattex/Revestive (teduglutide), with weekly vs daily dosing as the differentiator

deals.deal_structure: $20.00/share cash. ~$1.1B equity value. 92% premium to 30-day VWAP. Closed Q4 2022.
deals.moa: Oral once-daily allosteric activator of erythrocyte pyruvate kinase (PKR)
deals.pathophysiology: PKR activation increases ATP and decreases 2,3-DPG in red cells, raising hemoglobin oxygen affinity and reducing HbS polymerization/sickling and hemolysis
deals.rationale: Diversifies Novo Nordisk beyond diabetes/obesity into rare blood disorders; competes with Agios's Pyrukynd (mitapivat) which was first in PKR-activator class

deals.deal_structure: $38.00/share cash. ~$3.2B equity value on fully-diluted basis. 56% premium to 60-day VWAP. Closed Sept 2021.
deals.lead_asset: mRNA platform (MRT5005 inhaled CFTR; mRNA vaccine candidates)
deals.moa: Lipid nanoparticle (LNP)-delivered mRNA encoding therapeutic proteins and antigens
deals.indication: Cystic fibrosis (MRT5005, inhaled CFTR mRNA); flu, COVID-19, and other infectious-disease vaccines
deals.pathophysiology: MRT5005 aims to deliver functional CFTR mRNA to airway epithelium, addressing CF regardless of underlying CFTR mutation — complementary to Vertex's small-molecule modulators
deals.rationale: Cements Sanofi's pre-existing 2018 mRNA vaccine collaboration; builds mRNA capability versus Moderna/Pfizer-BioNTech post-COVID, internalizing LNP/mRNA know-how

deals.deal_structure: $16.00/ADS cash plus $1.00/ADS CVR tied to U.S. OTL-200 approval. ~$387M upfront / up to ~$478M total. 144% premium to 30-day VWAP. Closed Jan 2024.
deals.moa: Autologous ex vivo lentiviral hematopoietic stem-cell gene therapy delivering functional ARSA gene
deals.indication: Metachromatic leukodystrophy (MLD) — pre/early-symptomatic late-infantile and juvenile forms
deals.pathophysiology: ARSA enzyme deficiency causes sulfatide accumulation in CNS/PNS, leading to demyelination and rapid neurological decline; gene-corrected HSCs engraft and provide ARSA via cross-correction in CNS macrophages
deals.rationale: Adds an approved one-time gene therapy (EU/UK/US approved) to Kyowa Kirin's rare-disease franchise (Crysvita); broadens beyond bone-mineral and oncology rare-disease assets

deals.deal_structure: PE take-private. Original offer: $3.00/share cash + $6.84/share CVR on $600M trailing-12-month sales by Dec 31, 2027 (max $9.84/share). Subsequently raised election option to $5.00/share all-cash. ~$30M upfront equity value. Closed June 2, 2025.
deals.moa: Autologous ex vivo lentiviral hematopoietic stem-cell gene therapies — Zynteglo/Lyfgenia add functional beta-globin (HbAT87Q); Skysona adds ABCD1
deals.indication: Transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia (Zynteglo), cerebral adrenoleukodystrophy (Skysona), sickle cell disease (Lyfgenia)
deals.pathophysiology: Each disease results from a single-gene defect (HBB, ABCD1); gene-corrected autologous HSCs engraft to produce missing/dysfunctional protein for life
deals.rationale: Take-private rescue financing — bluebird had three approved gene therapies but commercial uptake was slow (manufacturing/QTC complexity, pricing pressure from Vertex's Casgevy in SCD); PE capital scales commercial delivery

deals.deal_structure: $115.00/share cash plus $5.00/share CVR contingent on cumulative anito-cel global net sales of $6.0B by end of 2029. ~$7.8B implied equity value. Closed April 28, 2026. Builds on prior 2022 Kite/Arcellx collaboration.
deals.moa: Autologous BCMA-directed CAR-T cell therapy; uses a compact D-domain binder (vs scFv) for low immunogenicity
deals.pathophysiology: BCMA is highly expressed on malignant plasma cells; CAR-T eradicates BCMA+ myeloma cells. D-domain design may reduce neurotoxicity (Parkinsonism/cranial-nerve palsies) seen with competing BCMA CAR-Ts
deals.rationale: Consolidates full economic ownership of anito-cel for Gilead/Kite ahead of expected commercial launch, eliminating profit-share/milestone/royalty obligations; positions Kite vs Bristol's Abecma and J&J/Legend's Carvykti in MM

deals.deal_structure: Cash-shell wind-down. $1.95/share cash + non-transferable CVR (pro-rata share of excess cash above $102.95M, lease savings, and 90% of any future norovirus program disposition proceeds). ~$75M equity value. Closed Q4 2025.
deals.moa: Bivalent virus-like-particle vaccine (GI.1 and GII.4 norovirus genotypes), intramuscular
deals.pathophysiology: Noroviruses are the leading cause of acute gastroenteritis globally; VLP vaccines induce humoral and mucosal immunity against multiple genotypes
deals.rationale: XOMA Royalty's wind-down/acquisition strategy for ex-cash biotech shells after HIL-214's NEST-IN1 pediatric Phase 2b miss in July 2024; XOMA monetizes remaining cash, lease savings, and any future asset value

deals.deal_structure: $3.56/share cash at close (~$75M upfront) plus up to $8.91/share CVR ($1.78 on U.S. Ixo-vec approval within 7 years; $7.13 on first year of $1B+ global net sales within 10 years). Up to $12.47/share / ~$261M total. Tender offer commenced Nov 7, 2025; expected Q4 2025 close.
deals.moa: Intravitreal AAV.7m8-based gene therapy delivering aflibercept (anti-VEGF) cDNA for continuous in-eye expression
deals.pathophysiology: Wet AMD is driven by VEGF-mediated choroidal neovascularization; current standard of care requires repeated intravitreal anti-VEGF injections every 1-3 months — one-time gene therapy could eliminate injection burden
deals.rationale: Bolsters Lilly's emerging gene-therapy and ophthalmology footprint; one-time durable anti-VEGF could disrupt Regeneron's Eylea/Eylea HD and Roche's Vabysmo franchises

deals.deal_structure: Cash-shell wind-down. $0.36/share cash + non-tradeable CVR (100% of closing net cash above $26.4M plus 80% of any EO-1022 net proceeds within one year). ~$21M equity value. Closed July 2025.
deals.moa: HER3-directed ADC (program discontinued/being out-licensed); prior lead EO-3021 (Claudin 18.2 ADC) discontinued March 2025
deals.indication: HER3-expressing solid tumors (originally gastric/GEJ for EO-3021)
deals.pathophysiology: HER3 (ERBB3) drives resistance to EGFR/HER2-targeted therapies and is overexpressed across solid tumors; ADC strategy delivers cytotoxic payload to HER3+ cells
deals.rationale: Tang Capital cash-shell acquisition — Elevation had discontinued EO-3021 after underwhelming Phase 1 data and was a 'zombie' biotech trading below cash; Concentra unlocks remaining cash and any residual asset value

deals.deal_structure: $6.23/share cash. ~$210M total deal value (~$149M enterprise value). Closed Aug 22, 2022.
deals.moa: Giapreza: synthetic human angiotensin II vasopressor (AT1R agonist). Xerava: fluorocycline-class IV antibiotic with activity against multidrug-resistant Gram-negatives, Gram-positives, and anaerobes
deals.indication: Giapreza: septic/distributive shock vasopressor support. Xerava: complicated intra-abdominal infections (cIAI)
deals.pathophysiology: In refractory distributive shock, exogenous angiotensin II restores vascular tone when norepinephrine is inadequate. Xerava addresses growing AMR by retaining activity against ESBL/CRE pathogens
deals.rationale: Innoviva (royalty/holding company spun from Theravance) added two commercial hospital products to a portfolio already including Entasis (sulbactam-durlobactam, Xacduro) — consolidating into a hospital infectious-disease/critical-care platform

deals.deal_structure: $3.25/share cash at close (~$91M) plus $1.75/share CVR on mirokidney clinical-development milestone by Dec 31, 2025. Closed Q1 2024.
deals.moa: Perfusion decellularization of porcine organs leaving extracellular matrix scaffold, then re-cellularization with human cells to produce transplantable bioengineered organs
deals.indication: End-stage liver disease (miroliver/ELAP external bridge), end-stage renal disease (mirokidney)
deals.pathophysiology: Severe organ shortage in transplantation; mirokidney/miroliver aim to produce abundant, immunologically tolerable replacement organs without lifelong immunosuppression
deals.rationale: Complements United Therapeutics' existing organ-manufacturing programs (Revivicor xenotransplantation, ex vivo lung perfusion, 3D bioprinting) — consolidates the largest organ-manufacturing platform in industry

deals.deal_structure: $2.07/share cash. ~$70M total equity value. Closed Nov 2022.
deals.lead_asset: GeneRide (site-specific genome integration platform) and sAAVy (next-gen AAV capsid platform)
deals.moa: GeneRide enables promoterless homologous-recombination-based gene insertion at safe-harbor or endogenous loci, enabling durable expression in pediatric/growing tissues; sAAVy generates novel AAV capsids for improved tropism
deals.pathophysiology: Traditional AAV gene therapy episomes dilute in dividing pediatric cells; GeneRide aims for permanent integration without nucleases
deals.rationale: Bolt-on for Alexion/AZ Rare Disease genomic-medicines build-out — adds vector design and integration platforms post Pfizer collaboration termination

deals.deal_structure: $0.34/share cash (~$23.5M) plus up to $0.73/share CVR (~$50M aggregate) on future milestones. 42% premium to AGTC's Oct 21, 2022 close. Closed Q1 2023.
deals.moa: AAV-based gene-replacement therapy delivering RPGR (codon-optimized) to photoreceptors via subretinal injection
deals.indication: X-linked retinitis pigmentosa (XLRP) due to RPGR mutations
deals.pathophysiology: RPGR loss causes progressive photoreceptor degeneration and blindness in young males; gene replacement aims to restore RPGR function and arrest degeneration
deals.rationale: Syncona, a UK gene-therapy investor, acquired AGTC for its retinal gene-therapy clinical assets and AAV manufacturing — adjacent to its Nightstar (sold to Biogen) thesis

deals.deal_structure: $10.50/share cash. ~$250M equity value. Closed May 31, 2022.
deals.moa: CpG-A oligodeoxynucleotide TLR9 agonist packaged inside a Qbeta bacteriophage-derived virus-like particle (intratumoral injection)
deals.pathophysiology: TLR9 stimulation of plasmacytoid dendritic cells drives type I IFN response and innate-immune activation in the tumor microenvironment, potentially overcoming PD-1 resistance
deals.rationale: Complements Regeneron's Libtayo (cemiplimab) franchise with an intratumoral combination partner aimed at PD-1-refractory disease; positions vs Idera's tilsotolimod (which had failed in 2020)

deals.deal_structure: All-stock; Coherus issued shares at $5.2831/share. Implied value up to ~$65M (= $40M + Surface net cash at close) plus CVRs on previously partnered assets (NZV930 with Novartis, GSK4381562 with GSK). Closed Sept 2023.
deals.moa: SRF388: monoclonal antibody blocking IL-27, an immunosuppressive cytokine in the TME. SRF114: afucosylated antibody targeting CCR8+ tumor-infiltrating regulatory T cells for depletion
deals.indication: SRF388: lung and liver cancer (Phase 2). SRF114: advanced solid tumors (Phase 1/2)
deals.pathophysiology: IL-27 (driven by HIF-1alpha in hypoxic TME) suppresses effector T cells; CCR8 selectively marks tumor-resident Tregs — depletion releases anti-tumor immunity without systemic Treg loss
deals.rationale: Built out Coherus's nascent immuno-oncology pipeline alongside its newly approved Loqtorzi (toripalimab, anti-PD-1) — positioning a small specialty oncology player with multiple novel I-O mechanisms

deals.deal_structure: All-stock merger: 1.5117 Adaptimmune ADS per TCR2 share. ~$110M implied equity value. Adaptimmune holders ~75% / TCR2 holders ~25% of combined company. Closed June 1, 2023.
deals.lead_asset: Gavocabtagene autoleucel (gavo-cel, TC-210) — autologous mesothelin-directed TRuC-T
deals.moa: T-cell receptor fusion construct (TRuC) — single-domain mesothelin binder fused to CD3-epsilon, engaging the endogenous TCR complex (vs canonical CAR-T)
deals.pathophysiology: TRuC engages full TCR signaling complex, theoretically improving safety/efficacy vs CD3z-only CAR-Ts in solid tumors; mesothelin is overexpressed in multiple solid tumors with limited normal-tissue expression
deals.rationale: Combined Adaptimmune's TCR platform (afami-cel/Tecelra in synovial sarcoma) with TCR2's TRuC platform plus ~$100M in TCR2 cash, creating a broader solid-tumor cell-therapy company

deals.deal_structure: C$2.41/share cash (~US$1.78/share) under amended arrangement agreement Feb 23, 2026; 28% premium to 30-day VWAP. Shareholders approved March 31, 2026. Closing extended to June 30, 2026 pending regulatory/court approvals. Total equity value ~US$15-25M (small float). Hanmi already held loans/equity in Aptose.
deals.moa: Once-daily oral multi-kinase inhibitor targeting SYK, mutant and wild-type FLT3, mutant KIT, JAK1/2, and RSK2
deals.indication: Acute myeloid leukemia — front-line triplet (with venetoclax + azacitidine, TUSCANY study)
deals.pathophysiology: AML is driven by FLT3-ITD/TKD and other kinase signaling; tuspetinib's broader kinase profile may overcome resistance vs first-gen FLT3 inhibitors (e.g., gilteritinib) and complement BCL2 inhibition (venetoclax)
deals.rationale: Hanmi consolidates full ownership of tuspetinib (originally out-licensed to Aptose) after providing bridge financing — internalizes a Phase 1/2 AML asset rather than pay Aptose milestones; effectively a take-private of a struggling licensee
